trigger: Upon completion of any task involving errors or pattern violations
pipeline: error → Evidence (E-*.json) → [3+ occurrences] → Skill Proposal (SP-*.json) → [approved] → Skill (.md)
action: Record each error as Evidence. Do not create Skills directly. Wait for 3+ evidence items sharing the same pattern before drafting a Skill Proposal.
rationale: Prevents memory bloating. 100 incidents → 10 evidence items → 3 proposals → 1 skill.
